articles.title: Meta Superintelligence – Leadership Compute, Talent, and Data
articles.summary: Meta’s shocking purchase of 49% of Scale AI at a ~$30B valuation shows that money is of no concern for the $100B annual cashflow ad machine. Despite seemingly unlimited resources, Meta has been falling behind foundation labs in model performance.
